Footer.tagline: Transform your interiors with artificial intelligence.

Home.metaTitle: AI virtual staging for real estate agencies
Home.metaDescription: Sell the dream before the viewing. InstaDeco stages your listings with AI in seconds: one photo, one style, a render ready to publish. Virtual home staging built for real estate agencies and home stagers.

faq.question: How does InstaDeco’s AI décor work?
faq.answer: Take a photo of your room, pick one of 20+ styles (Modern, Scandinavian, Japandi, Bohemian…), and our AI returns a photorealistic redesign in ~30 seconds while preserving your layout (walls, windows, volumes).

faq.question: How does pricing compare to an interior designer?
faq.answer: Designers often charge around €150/hour for a consultation. With InstaDeco, generations start from €0.99 and you get a comparable visual in 30 seconds instead of two weeks.

faq.question: Which décor styles are available?
faq.answer: InstaDeco offers 12 curated styles: Modern, Scandinavian, Industrial, Bohemian, Japandi, Minimalist, Art Deco, Haussmannian, Mid‑century, Coastal, Luxury, plus “Keep my style” to refresh without a full overhaul. Every style works for any room type.

faq.question: Can I use InstaDeco for virtual home staging?
faq.answer: Yes! Virtual staging is a core use case. Agents and owners use InstaDeco to furnish empty listings so buyers can project themselves, boosting visits and speeding sales.

faq.question: Are the generated images realistic?
faq.answer: We use Flux.1 with ControlNet to respect your room’s structure and deliver photorealistic results. Images are downloadable in HD for sharing or print.

Legal.frenchBodyNotice: The legal texts below are provided in French (authoritative version). A full translation will be published soon.

PricingMeta.title: Pricing & credits, AI décor without a subscription | InstaDeco AI
PricingMeta.description: Buy credits with no subscription to transform rooms with AI. From €9.90 for 10 HD generations. Credits never expire. Secure Stripe payments.
PricingMeta.ogTitle: InstaDeco AI pricing, AI décor from €9.90
PricingMeta.ogDescription: No subscription surprises, buy credits and generate whenever you want.
PricingMeta.twitterDescription: Credits without a subscription. Secure payments.

faq.question: How much does one image generation cost?
faq.answer: 1 credit = 1 generation. It’s that simple! Each generation gives you a high‑quality image (1024×1024 px) you can download right away.

faq.question: Do my credits expire?
faq.answer: Never! Your credits stay on your account indefinitely. Use them whenever you want, at your own pace, no pressure, no deadline.

faq.question: What is the quality of generated images?
faq.answer: All images are high definition (1024×1024 px). You can also unlock HD+ (2048×2048) for just €4.99 per image, great for large prints!

faq.question: Can I use the images for my business?
faq.answer: Absolutely! You own every image you generate. Use them for personal projects, your portfolio, clients, social media, no commercial restrictions.

faq.question: How do I pick the right style for my room?
faq.answer: We offer 12 styles (Modern, Scandinavian, Japandi, Bohemian…). Pick the mood you want, then adjust transformation intensity. “Décor only” keeps your furniture and changes just the décor!

faq.question: How do I download my creations?
faq.answer: Easy! Once an image is generated, click ‘Download’, it saves to your device. You’ll also find everything in your dashboard history.

faq.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: All major cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay and Google Pay. Payments are secured by Stripe.

faq.question: Can I get a refund?
faq.answer: Yes! If you have not used your credits, you can request a full refund within 14 days of purchase, just email us. Used credits are non‑refundable.

faq.question: How does the subscription work?
faq.answer: Credits are added automatically every month, fully transparent. Cancel anytime from your account, no fees. The annual plan saves an extra 20%.

faq.question: Do unused credits roll over?
faq.answer: Yes, with Pro and Business, unused credits roll to the next month (up to 2 months). Nothing is wasted!

faq.question: What if I don’t like the result?
faq.answer: AI is creative! Rerun with the same settings for a new proposal, or tweak intensity or change style.

faq.question: Which photos work best?
faq.answer: Well‑lit, straight‑on photos showing the whole space work best. Avoid blur and darkness. Empty or lightly furnished rooms give the AI more freedom.
